# ██████╗ ██╗██╗   ██╗███████╗██████╗
# ██╔══██╗██║██║   ██║██╔════╝██╔══██╗
# ██║  ██║██║██║   ██║█████╗  ██████╔╝
# ██║  ██║██║╚██╗ ██╔╝██╔══╝  ██╔══██╗
# ██████╔╝██║ ╚████╔╝ ███████╗██║  ██║
# ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═══╝  ╚══════╝╚═╝  ╚═╝

EF_gold_gui_stack = {  	
	value = gold_state_native_for_stockpile
	#divide = 10000000 #10 000 000
	divide = 100000000 #100 000 000
	round = yes	 
} 
EF_gold_gui_room = {  	
	value = EF_gold_gui_stack
	divide = 18		
	#round = yes  
	ceiling = yes
}
EF_gold_gui_room_brut = {  	
	value = EF_gold_gui_stack
	divide = 18		
	#round = yes  
}
 
EF_silver_gui_stack = {  	
	value = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
	#divide = 1000000000	#1 000 000 000
	divide = 500000000	#500 000 000 
	round = yes	 
} 
EF_silver_gui_room = {  	
	value = EF_silver_gui_stack
	divide = 6		
	#round = yes  
	ceiling = yes
}
EF_silver_gui_room_brut = {  	
	value = EF_silver_gui_stack
	divide = 6		
	#round = yes  
} 

EF_gui_room_brut = {  	
	if = {  	
		limit = {  	
			EF_gold_gui_room_brut > EF_silver_gui_room_brut
		} 
		add = EF_gold_gui_room_brut
	}  	
	if = {  	
		limit = {  	
			EF_gold_gui_room_brut < EF_silver_gui_room_brut
		} 
		add = EF_silver_gui_room_brut
	} 
}  

EF_current_room_moins_1 = {  	
	value = var:EF_current_room 
	subtract = 1 
}
 
#last room gold  
	avant_der_room = {   
		value = EF_gold_gui_room
		subtract = 1   
	} 
	avant_der_total_gold = {  	
		value = avant_der_room
		multiply = 18 
	} 
	avant_der_room_gold_quantity = {  	
		value = EF_gold_gui_stack
		subtract = avant_der_total_gold  
	} 
#end last room gold

#last room silver  
	avant_der_room_silver = {   
		value = EF_silver_gui_room
		subtract = 1   
	} 
	avant_der_total_silver = {  	
		value = avant_der_room_silver
		multiply = 6 
	} 
	avant_der_room_silver_quantity = {  	
		value = EF_silver_gui_stack
		subtract = avant_der_total_silver  
	} 
#end last room silver

00_ef_economic_event_6 = {  				
	if = {
		limit = { is_set = global_var:usa_coinage_act_1873 } 
		add = 1
	}  
} 
silver_crisis_multiplicator_factor = { 
	value = 1 				
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard } 
		subtract = {
			value = time_from_begining_silver_crisis 
			divide = 27 
			multiply = 0.9
		}
	} 

	min = 0.1
	max = 1
} 
time_from_begining_silver_crisis = {
	value = game_date.year 
	subtract = 1873 
}

law_no_monetary_system_test = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		#- mesure de régulation pour etre sure que tout les pays ayant la tech currency_standards,
		#et pas encore de bc soit dans la loi fiat standart qui permet l'introduction
		#- quleque soit le pb quand une nouvelle currency doit apparaitre le pays doit toujours etre revenue en fiat standart
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_no_monetary_system
			has_technology_researched = currency_standards
			#has_technology_researched = central_banking

			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
				not = {
					has_modifier = has_central_bank
				}
			}
 		}
		add =1
	}
}

country_already_central_bank_test = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = country_already_central_bank
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding_no_external_currency_consuption = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			market_owner_is_root = no
			or = {
				bank_central_buiding_no_external_currency_consuption = yes
				not = {
					has_law = law_type:law_external_exchange_standard
				}
			}
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding_test = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			market_owner_is_root = yes
			or = {
				market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
				has_law = law_type:law_external_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

		limit = {

currency_quantity_sell = {
	value = 0.5
	if = {
		limit = {
			or  = {
				#has_modifier = extreme_weak_currency voir si on change
				var:currency_crisis = 1
				var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.infamy >= infamy_threshold:pariah
			}
		}
		add = 0.5
	}
}

		add = level
	}

bg_bank_lvl = {
	value = 0
	every_scope_building = {
		limit = {
			is_building_group = bg_bank
		}
		add = level
	}
}
bg_bank_lvl_by_base_rate = {
	value = bg_bank_lvl
	multiply = {
		value = {
		 	add = 10
		 	subtract = base_rate_percentage_decimal
		}
		divide = 9
	}
	max = bg_bank_lvl
	min = 1
	round = yes
}
value_for_has_financial_center = {
	value = bg_financial_centre_lvl
	multiply = base_rate_to_pcs_factor #private_bank_borrowings_year_var_2
 
	round = yes
}

	value = 0

		limit = {
			or = {

			}
		}

	}
}

enemy_capital_is_occuped = {
	value = 0
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_at_war = yes
			has_war_with = ROOT
		}
		capital = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					controller = ROOT
					has_modifier = central_bank_place
				}
				add = 1
			}
		}
	}
}
enemy_stats_is_occuped = {
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_at_war = yes
			has_war_with = ROOT
		}
		every_scope_state = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					controller = ROOT
				}
				add = 1
			}
		}
	}
}

institution_economic_central_bank_lvl = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value >= 1
			}

		}
		add = 0.5
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value >= 2
			}

		}
		add = 0.5
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value >= 3
			}

		}
		add = 0.5
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value >= 4
			}

		}
		add = 0.5
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value >= 5
			}

		}
		add = 0.5
	}
}
institution_economic_central_bank_lvl_brut = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value = 1
			}

		}
		add = 1
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value = 2
			}

		}
		add = 2
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value = 3
			}

		}
		add = 3
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value = 4
			}

		}
		add = 4
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			institution_investment_level = {
				institution = institution_economic_central_bank
				value = 5
			}

		}
		add = 5
	}
}

financial_product_by_trade_route = {
	value = 0

	if  = {
		limit = {
			has_technology_researched = postal_savings

		}
		add = 0.25
	}
	if  = {
		limit = {
			has_technology_researched = investment_banks

		}
		add = 0.25
	}
	if  = {
		limit = {
			has_technology_researched = international_exchange_standards

		}
		add = 0.25
	}
	if  = {
		limit = {
			has_technology_researched = modern_financial_instruments

		}
		add = 0.25
	}
}

#manufacture_stock limit
manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs = {
	value = 0
	every_scope_building = {
		limit = {
			is_building_type = building_ef_private_construction
		}
		add = modifier:goods_output_manufacture_stock_add
		#multiply = overbuilding_regulation_factor_revers
	}
}
manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs_real = {
	value = manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs
	multiply = var:overbuilding_regulation_factor_revers_fix
}
manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs_rate = {
	value = manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs_real
	divide = manufacture_stock_market_goods_sell_orders #mon 100%
}
overbuilding_regulation_factor = {
    value = 0
    if = {
        limit = {
            manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs_rate > 0.10
            manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs_rate < 0.40
        }
        # Régulation progressive de 0 à 70 entre 10% et 40%
        add = manufacture_stock_product_by_pcs_rate
        subtract = 0.10
        divide = 0.30
        multiply = 70
    }

    # En dessous ou égal à 10%, add = 0
}
overbuilding_regulation_factor_revers = {
	value = 100
	subtract = overbuilding_regulation_factor
	#multiply = -1
	divide = 100
	# subtract = 0.15
	# min = -1
}

extreme_weak_currency_solution_count_sc = {
    value = 0
    add = var:extreme_weak_currency_solution_count_player
    add = var:extreme_weak_currency_solution_count
}

		add = 1
	}

			var:scandinavian_monetary_union_on_discution = 1
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

base_demande_currency = {  
	value = 0
	#dinar
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
		} 
		add = scope:central_bank_scope.modifier:goods_output_dinar_c_add
	} 
	#dinar_algerian_dinar

		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
		}

target_demand_currency = {
    value = currency_market_goods_sell_orders
    multiply = 1 #ajuster cette vvaleur pour augmenter prix du bien au dessus de neutralité
}
target_demand_currency_ajusted = {
    value = target_demand_currency 
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		or = {
	# 			is_subject = yes
	# 			not = {
	# 				market.owner = root
	# 			}
	# 		}
	# 	}
	# 	multiply = 0.05
	# }
	if = { limit = { has_modifier = devaluation_currency_25  } multiply = 1.25 }
	if = { limit = { has_modifier = devaluation_currency_50  } multiply = 1.50 }
	if = { limit = { has_modifier = devaluation_currency_75  } multiply = 1.75 }

	if = { limit = { has_modifier = revaluation_currency_25 } multiply = 0.75 }
	if = { limit = { has_modifier = revaluation_currency_50 } multiply = 0.50 }
	if = { limit = { has_modifier = revaluation_currency_75 } multiply = 0.25 } 

	min = 0 
}
target_demand_currency_for_modifier = { 
	value = 0 
	value = target_demand_currency_ajusted
	subtract = base_demande_currency_fix
	divide = base_demande_currency_fix
	multiply = 100 
	
	#max = 25000
}

difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies = {
	value = money_value_in_gold #money_value_rapported_inflation
	divide = global_var:money_value_median
}
difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers = {
	value = 1
	subtract = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies
	multiply = -1
}
difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_normalized = {
	value = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers
	multiply = -1
}
difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_100 = {
	value = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_normalized
	multiply = 100
}

global_monetary_reference = {
	value = global_var:money_value_reference_currency
}

#money_value
money_value_reference_currency = {
	value = global_var:money_value_reference_currency
}
money_value_reference_currency_flux = {
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
		}
		value = money_value
	}
}

#money_value_rapported_inflation
money_value_rapported_inflation_reference_currency = {
	value = global_var:money_value_rapported_inflation_reference_currency
}

	every_country = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
		}
		value = money_value_rapported_inflation
	}
}

	value = global_var:money_supply_reference_currency
}

	every_country = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
		}
		value = money_supply
	}
}

#money_supply_stockpile_by_other_country_reference_currency

	value = global_var:money_supply_stockpile_by_other_country_reference_currency
}

	every_country = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
		}
		value = money_supply_stockpile_by_other_country
	}
}

player_has_central_bank = {
	value = 0
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_player = yes
			has_modifier = has_central_bank
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_player = yes
		}
		value = money_value
	}
}

		}

#devaluation
devaluation_rate_normalized = {
	value = var:devaluation_rate
	add = 100
	divide = 100
}
money_value_predicted_devaluation = {
	value = national_capacity
	divide = money_supply_predicted_devaluation
	max = 100
}
money_supply_predicted_revaluation = {
	value = money_supply
	add = money_supply_predicted_add_revaluation_1
}
money_supply_predicted_devaluation = {
	value = money_supply
	multiply = devaluation_rate_normalized
}
money_supply_predicted_add_devaluation_1 = {
	value = money_supply_predicted_devaluation
	subtract = money_supply
}
inflation_value_predicted_devaluation = {
	add = devaluation_rate_normalized
	subtract = 1
	divide = var:devaluation_time #pas besoin de le validé car les bouton sont intouchable
}
devaluation_time_month = {
	value = var:devaluation_time
	multiply = 12
}
devaluation_time_1_month = { #special for exchange control
	value = var:devaluation_time_1
	multiply = 12
}
devaluation_time_week = {
	value = var:devaluation_time
	multiply = 52
}
inflation_value_predicted_devaluation_month = {
	value = var:devaluation_rate
    divide = devaluation_time_month
}
money_supply_to_add_per_month = { #valeur à ajouter par an
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			var:devaluation_on = 1
		}
		add = var:money_supply_predicted_add_devaluation_1_month_valided #valided to save the vare
		divide = devaluation_time_month
	}
}
devaluation_on_time_scripted = {
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			var:devaluation_on = 1
		}
		add = devaluation_time_month
		subtract = var:devaluation_on_time
	}
}

#revaluation
revaluation_rate_normalized = {
	value = 100
	subtract = var:revaluation_rate
	divide = 100
}
money_value_predicted_revaluation = {
	value = national_capacity
	divide = money_supply_predicted_revaluation
	max = 100
}
money_supply_predicted_revaluation = {
	value = money_supply
	add = money_supply_predicted_add_revaluation_1
}
money_supply_state_predicted_revaluation = {
	value = money_supply_state #money_supply
	multiply = revaluation_rate_normalized
}
money_supply_predicted_add_revaluation_1 = { #money_supply_to_subtract_per_month
	value = money_supply_state_predicted_revaluation #money_supply
	subtract = money_supply_state
}
inflation_value_predicted_revaluation = {
	add = revaluation_rate_normalized
	subtract = 1
	multiply = var:revaluation_time
}
revaluation_time_month = {
	value = var:revaluation_time
	multiply = 12
}
revaluation_time_1_month = { #special for exchange control
	value = var:revaluation_time_1
	multiply = 12
}
revaluation_time_week = {
	value = var:revaluation_time
	multiply = 52
}
inflation_value_predicted_revaluation_month = {
	value = var:revaluation_rate
    divide = revaluation_time_month
	multiply = -1
}
money_supply_to_subtract_per_month = {
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			var:revaluation_on = 1
		}
		add = var:money_supply_predicted_add_revaluation_1_month_valided #valided to save the vare
		divide = revaluation_time_month
	}
}
revaluation_on_time_scripted = { #valeur à ajouter par an
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			var:revaluation_on = 1
		}
		add = revaluation_time_month
		subtract = var:revaluation_on_time
	}
}

# ███╗   ███╗ ██████╗ ███╗   ██╗███████╗██╗   ██╗    ██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ██╗     ██╗   ██╗███████╗
# ████╗ ████║██╔═══██╗████╗  ██║██╔════╝╚██╗ ██╔╝    ██║   ██║██╔══██╗██║     ██║   ██║██╔════╝
# ██╔████╔██║██║   ██║██╔██╗ ██║█████╗   ╚████╔╝     ██║   ██║███████║██║     ██║   ██║█████╗
# ██║╚██╔╝██║██║   ██║██║╚██╗██║██╔══╝    ╚██╔╝      ╚██╗ ██╔╝██╔══██║██║     ██║   ██║██╔══╝
# ██║ ╚═╝ ██║╚██████╔╝██║ ╚████║███████╗   ██║███████╗╚████╔╝ ██║  ██║███████╗╚██████╔╝███████╗
# ╚═╝     ╚═╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═══╝╚══════╝   ╚═╝╚══════╝ ╚═══╝  ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝ ╚═════╝ ╚══════╝

############################################################################################################################################################
############################################################################################################################################################
############################################################################################################################################################
############################################################################################################################################################

money_value = {

	if = {
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_modifier = has_central_bank
			}
		}
		value = money_value_no_bc
	}

	#has_central_bank subjectt/no market owner
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = has_central_bank
		}
		value = money_value_0
	}

	#subjectt
	if = {
		limit = {
	        market_owner_is_root_4 = no
        }
		if = {
			limit = {
				market.owner = {
					has_modifier = has_central_bank
				}
			}
			value = market.owner.money_value_0

			#subject
			if = {
				limit = {
					is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					market.owner = {
						is_player = no
					}
				}
				multiply = subject_overlord_gdp_ratio_revers
				#min = 0.01
			}

			#no market.owner
			if = {
				limit = {
					is_subject_custom_trigger = no
					market.owner = {
						is_player = no
					}
				}
			    value = market.owner.money_value_0
			}

			#market.owner = player
			if = {
				limit = {
					market.owner = {
						is_player = yes
					}
				}
				divide = market.owner.var:parity_scaled_by_the_overlord
				add = 1
				min = 0.01
			}
		}
	}

	# #no market owner
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		market_owner_is_root_4 = no
	# 		is_subject = no
	# 	}
	# 	if = {
	# 		limit = {
	# 			market.owner = {
	# 				has_modifier = has_central_bank
	# 			}
	# 		}
	# 		value = market.owner.money_value_0
	# 	}
	# }

	#max = revaluation_money_value_max
	max = 100
	min = 0.0001
}
money_value_target_2_in_gold = {
	min = 0.0001

	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		add = var:money_value_target_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		value = var:money_value_target_2
		multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		value = var:money_value_target_2
		#multiply = bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold
	}
}
money_value_0 = {
	value = 0

	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_fiat_standard
			#has_law = law_type:law_no_monetary_system
		}
		value = 0.01
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			}
		}
		value = national_capacity
		divide = money_supply
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
		}
		add = money_value_by_reference_currency
	}

	#max = 10
}
money_value_in_gold = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			market_owner_is_root_4 = yes
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		add = money_value
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			market_owner_is_root_4  = yes
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = money_value_silver_standard_in_gold
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			market_owner_is_root_4  = yes
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		add = money_value_bimetallism_standard_in_gold
	}
	if = { #subject
		limit = {
			or  = {
			    market_owner_is_root_4 = no
			    is_subject = yes
		    }
		}
		add = money_value
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type_2
	}

	min = 0.0001
}

	value = 0.01

private_bank_funds_limit = {
	value = money_supply
	multiply = private_bank_funds_limit_ratio

	#peut introduire des valeur scriptée ici 
}
private_bank_funds_limit_ratio = {
    value = 0

    # 1. Couverture influence la sécurité → limite
    add = {
        value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent
        multiply = 0.20      # Max +0.20
    }

    # 2. Développement financier (taille du secteur bancaire)
    add = {
        value = private_bank_funds
        divide = money_supply
        multiply = 0.10      # Max +0.50
    }

    # 3. Stabilité du taux de base (crédit stable → limite plus haute)
    add = {
        value = base_rate_percentage
        multiply = -0.50     # taux haut → limite privée plus basse
    }

	
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference 
		}

		multiply = 2 
	}

    # Limite HARD : minimum 10%, maximum 60%
    min = 0.10
    max = 0.60
}
private_bank_funds_min_limit = {
	value = money_supply
	multiply = private_bank_funds_min_limit_ratio

	#peut introduire des valeur scriptée ici 
}
private_bank_funds_min_limit_ratio = {
    value = 0

    # 1. Couverture métallique : +0 à +4%
    add = {
        value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent
        multiply = 0.04     # très conservateur
    }

    # 2. Développement bancaire : +0 à +10%
    add = {
        value = private_bank_funds
        divide = money_supply
        multiply = 0.10     # au lieu de 0.20
    }

    # 3. Taux de base : +2% à -3%
    add = {
        value = base_rate_percentage
        multiply = -0.30     # +10% → -3% (raisonnable)
    }

    # 4. Monnaie internationale (monnaie refuge)
    if = {
        limit = { has_modifier = global_monetary_reference }
        multiply = 2     # ≠ pas x2 (trop violent)
    }

    # Hard limits conservateurs
    min = 0.05      # MIN plancher 5%
    max = 0.25      # MAX plancher 25%
}

	multiply = 0.6
}

	value = private_bank_funds_limit
	multiply = 0.8

national_capacity_in_gold = {
	min = 0.0001

	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			#no law_gold_exchange_standard
		}
		add = national_capacity
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = central_bank_reserves_silver_standard_in_gold
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		add = central_bank_reserves_bimetallism_standard_in_gold
	}
}

test_bourse  = {
	value = owner.var:circulating_dollar_united_states_dollar_c_var_1
	add = var:stockpiling_dollar_united_states_dollar_state_1
	multiply = owner.var:money_value_target_1
	multiply = 1 #0.9
}


national_capacity = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			}
		}
		add = central_bank_reserves #en fonction du type de metal
		add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal # en or pour gold standart et bimetalisme et convertis en equivalent argent pour le silver
		add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe # en or ou en metal sion utilise le money_value_in_gold
	}


	#tu dois armoniser le bimetalisme pour que la majoritait des 2 sources:
	# 	- add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal # en or pour gold standart et bimetalisme et convertis en equivalent argent pour le silver
	# 	- add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe # en or ou en metal sion utilise le money_value_in_gold
	# doivent etre en or, c'est uniquement dans le silver standart que c'est valeur sont adpaté pour avoir un esquivalent argent
	#concernant la reserve dans le bimetalisme l'or est compté à 1 et le silver est calculer dans sont équivalent or ce qui veux dire que c'est comme un gold standart quand la reserve est principalement composé d'or mais comme un silver standart dépendent du prix international du silver quand elle est composé de silver principalement


	min = 0.01
}

national_capacity_ratio = {
	add = national_capacity
	divide = money_supply
}
central_bank_reserves_ratio = {
	add = central_bank_reserves
	divide = national_capacity
}
gold_loaned_to_central_bank_ratio = {
	add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal
	divide = national_capacity
}
trade_balance_in_gold_ratio = {
	add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	divide = national_capacity
}

gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			#no law_gold_exchange_standard
		}
		add = var:gold_loaned_to_central_bank_fix
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = var:gold_loaned_to_central_bank_fix
		multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		add = var:gold_loaned_to_central_bank_fix
		#multiply = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
	}
}

gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal_silver = {
	value = var:gold_loaned_to_central_bank_fix
	multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
}

	value = var:gold_loaned_to_central_bank_fix
}

	value = var:gold_loaned_to_central_bank_fix
}

#central_bank_reserves

central_bank_reserves = {
	value = 0.01
	add = central_bank_metal_reserves_state
}

central_bank_metal_reserves_state = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		add = gold_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		add = bimetallic_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
}

central_bank_metal_reserves_state_per_month = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		add = stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_gold_standard
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_silver_standard
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		#add = stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_bimetallism_standard
		add = stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_bimetallism_standard_in_gold
	}
}

gold_state_native_for_stockpile = {
	value = 0
	add = {
		every_scope_state = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				}
				add = var:gold_state_1
			}
		}
	}
}
silver_state_native_for_stockpile = {
	value = 0
	add = {
		every_scope_state = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				}
				add = var:silver_state_1
			}
		}
	}
}
bimetallic_state_native_for_stockpile = {
	value = 0
	add = gold_state_native_for_stockpile
	add  = {
		add = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
		divide = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
}

silver_state_native_for_stockpile_in_gold = {
	value = 0
	add  = {
		add = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
		divide = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
}

trade_balance_gold_to_silver_rate = {
    add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
    multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
}
trade_balance_bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver = {
    add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
    multiply = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
}
trade_balance_bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold = {
    add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	divide = gold_to_silver_rate
	multiply = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver #normal tkt c'est inversé car le calcule e la trade balance concidére que c'est de l'or que l'on scale à de la argent -> dont on fait l'invese pour avoir la bonne quantité
}

import_value_in_gold_previsionel = {
	value = debt_in_national_currency #=debt_in_national_currency_in_gold à multiplié par la money value future


		multiply = {
			add = var:money_value_target_1
			#multiply = bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold
		} #= money_value_target_real_in_gold
}

trade_balance_fiat_to_silver = {
	value = {
		value = excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold_no_excess_in_gold_sc
		add = excess_in_gold_sc
   		multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
	subtract = import_value_in_gold
}
trade_balance_fiat_to_bimetallic = {
	value = {
		add = excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold_no_excess_in_gold_sc
		#multiply = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
		add = excess_in_gold_sc
	}
	subtract = import_value_in_gold
}
trade_balance_fiat_to_gold = {
	value = {
		value = excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold_no_excess_in_gold_sc
		add = excess_in_gold_sc
	}
	subtract = import_value_in_gold
}

trade_balance_silver_to_gold = {
	value = {
		value = excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold_no_excess_in_gold_sc #excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold
		multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
		add = excess_in_gold_sc
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_player = yes
		}
		subtract = {
			value = debt_in_national_currency
			multiply = {
				add = var:money_value_target_1
				multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
			} #= money_value_target_real_in_gold
		}
	}
}
trade_balance_silver_to_bimetallic = {
	value = {
		value = excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold_no_excess_in_gold_sc #excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold
		multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
		add = excess_in_gold_sc
	}
	subtract = {
		value = debt_in_national_currency
		multiply = {
			add = var:money_value_target_1
			multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
		} #= money_value_target_real_in_gold
	}
}

 		add = excess_in_gold_sc
	}
	subtract = {
		value = debt_in_national_currency
		multiply = var:money_value_target_1
	}

trade_balance_gold_to_silver = {
	value = {
		value = excess_foreign_state_currency_in_gold_no_excess_in_gold_sc
		multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
		add = excess_in_gold_sc
	}
	subtract = {
		value = debt_in_national_currency
		multiply = {
			add = var:money_value_target_1
			multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
		} #= money_value_target_real_in_gold
	}
}

##############
#monetary_systeme_silver_standard
##############
central_bank_metal_reserves_state_silver_standard = {
	value = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
}
central_bank_reserves_silver_standard = {
	value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_silver_standard
	add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal_silver

	#trade balance
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				var:law_fiat_standard = 1
				var:law_no_monetary_system = 1
			}
		}
		add = trade_balance_fiat_to_silver
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:law_silver_standard = 1
		}
		add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:law_bimetallism_standard = 1
		}
		add = trade_balance_bimetallic_to_silver #idem trade_balance_gold_to_silver
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				var:law_gold_standard = 1
				var:law_gold_exchange_standard = 1
			}
		}
		add = trade_balance_gold_to_silver #idem trade_balance_bimetallic_to_silver
	}
}
central_bank_reserves_silver_standard_in_gold = {
	value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_silver_standard
	add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal_silver
	add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
}
money_value_silver_standard = {
	value = central_bank_reserves_silver_standard
	divide = money_supply
}
money_value_silver_standard_in_gold = {
	value = money_value_silver_standard
	multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
}
money_value_silver_standard_in_gold_50 = {
	value = money_value_silver_standard_in_gold
	multiply = 0.50
}
money_value_silver_standard_in_gold_33 = {
	value = money_value_silver_standard_in_gold
	multiply = 0.66
}
stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_silver_standard = {
	value = 0
	#add = var:stockpiling_silver_var_2

	add = silver_market_goods_sell_orders

	#multiply = 1000
	multiply = 100

	multiply = 4 #month


	multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
}
stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_silver_standard_native = {
	value = 0
	#add = var:stockpiling_silver_var_2

	add = silver_market_goods_sell_orders

	#multiply = 1000

	multiply = 4 #month
}
stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_silver_standard_in_gold= {
	value = stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_silver_standard

	multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
}
##############
#monetary_systeme_bimetallism_standard
##############
central_bank_metal_reserves_state_bimetallism_standard = {
	value = bimetallic_state_native_for_stockpile
}

#serie de variable par type de standart qui prenne toute la veurl 1 quand la loi est set
#lorsqu'ne autre loi est set on utilise cetta variable pour savoir ou on était
#puis on rest tout et on met 1 sur la nouvelle loi

central_bank_reserves_bimetallism_standard = {
	value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_bimetallism_standard #ok
	add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal_bimetalic #ok

	#trade balance
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				var:law_no_monetary_system = 1
				var:law_fiat_standard = 1
				# has_law = law_type:law_fiat_standard
				# has_law = law_type:law_no_monetary_system
			}
		}
		add = trade_balance_fiat_to_bimetallic
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			#has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
			var:law_silver_standard = 1
		}
		add = trade_balance_silver_to_bimetallic
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			# has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
			var:law_bimetallism_standard = 1
		}
		add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				# has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				# has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
				var:law_gold_standard = 1
				var:law_gold_exchange_standard = 1
			}
		}
		add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe #trade_balance_gold_to_bimetallic
	}
}
central_bank_reserves_bimetallism_standard_in_gold = {
	value = central_bank_reserves_bimetallism_standard
	add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal_bimetalic
	add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	#multiply = bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold
}
money_value_bimetallism_standard = { #valeur utiliser pour definir la money valu tareget et qui change car on change de loi avant de faire le calcule
	value = central_bank_reserves_bimetallism_standard
	divide = money_supply
}
money_value_bimetallism_standard_in_gold = {
	#value = money_value_bimetallism_standard #pb avec le fiatt stta	andar affiche 0 ddonc je l'ai remis sinnon just money_value
	#multiply = bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold

	add  = {
		add = money_value_silver_standard_in_gold
		multiply = weight_silver
	}
	add  = {
		add = money_value_gold_standard
		multiply = weight_gold
	}
}
bimetallism_standard_proportional_silver= {
	value = money_value_silver_standard_in_gold
	multiply = weight_silver
}

bimetallism_standard_proportional_gold = {
	value = money_value_gold_standard
	multiply = weight_gold
}

money_value_bimetallism_standard_in_gold_50 = {
	value = money_value_bimetallism_standard_in_gold #pb avec le fiatt stta	andar affiche 0 ddonc je l'ai remis sinnon just money_value
	multiply = 0.50
}
money_value_bimetallism_standard_in_gold_33 = {
	value = money_value_bimetallism_standard_in_gold #pb avec le fiatt stta	andar affiche 0 ddonc je l'ai remis sinnon just money_value
	multiply = 0.66
}

	value = 0

		add = silver_market_goods_sell_orders
		#multiply = 1000
		multiply = 100
		multiply = 4 #month
		multiply = gold_to_silver_rate

		#multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
	}

	value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_gold_standard
	add = gold_loaned_to_central_bank_in_national_metal_gold

	#trade balance
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				var:law_no_monetary_system = 1
				var:law_fiat_standard = 1
			}
		}
		add = trade_balance_fiat_to_gold
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:law_silver_standard = 1
		}
		add = trade_balance_silver_to_gold
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:law_bimetallism_standard = 1
		}
		add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				var:law_gold_standard = 1
				var:law_gold_exchange_standard = 1
			}
		}
		add = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
	}
}

# rarity_factor = {
# 	value = 1
# 	divide = {
# 		value = building_ef_private_construction_lvl
# 		divide = 40
# 		multiply = 0.5
# 		add = 1
# 	}
# }

# rarity_factor = {
# 	value = 1
# 	divide = {
# 		value = building_ef_private_construction_lvl
# 		multiply = 0.35   # a = 0.35
# 		divide = 50       # b = 50
# 		add = 1
# 	}
# }
rarity_factor = {
    value = 1
    divide = {
        value = building_ef_private_construction_lvl
        # pente "a" conditionnelle inline
        multiply = {
            value = 0.35
            if = {          # quand beaucoup de bâtiments, on adoucit
                limit = { building_ef_private_construction_lvl >= 150 }
                value = 0.30
            }
        }
        divide = 50
        add = 1
    }
}
private_bank_funds_proportion_by_psc_10_by_rarity = {
	value = private_bank_funds_proportion_by_psc_10
	multiply = rarity_factor
}
private_bank_funds_proportion_by_psc_15_by_rarity = {
	value = private_bank_funds_proportion_by_psc_15
	multiply = rarity_factor
}
private_bank_funds_proportion_by_psc_20_by_rarity = {
	value = private_bank_funds_proportion_by_psc_20
	multiply = rarity_factor
}

valid_purchasable_currency_amount_10 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_10
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_09 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_09
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_08 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_08
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_07 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_07
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_06 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_06
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_05 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_05
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_04 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_04
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_03 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_03
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_02 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_02
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_01 = {
	value = gold_available_for_purchase_01
	divide = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value
}

valid_purchasable_currency_amount = {
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_10
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_10
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_10
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_9
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_9
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_9
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_8
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_8
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_8
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_7
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_7
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_7
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_6
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_6
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_6
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_5
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_5
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_5
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_4
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_4
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_4
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_3
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_3
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_3
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_2
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_2
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			purchasable_currency_amount < valid_purchasable_currency_amount_2
			purchasable_currency_amount > valid_purchasable_currency_amount_1
		}
		add = valid_purchasable_currency_amount_1
	}
}

valid_purchasable_currency_amount_1 = {
	value = 0
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_2 = {
	value = 0
}
valid_purchasable_currency_amount_3 = {
	value = 0
}

	value = central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion #la valeur nécessaire de métaux en plus de la trade balance et de la national cap pour assurer 75% de conversion
	multiply = 1 #0.75 #central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent -> je veux tout prendre pour appliquer la capcité de fiancment après
	subtract = central_bank_reserves #en fonction du type de metal
	subtract = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
}

	multiply = 0.75 #central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent -> je veux tout prendre pour appliquer la capcité de fiancment après
	subtract = central_bank_reserves #en fonction du type de metal
	subtract = var:trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
}

		add = gold_reserves_15
		subtract = gold_reserves_var
	}
}

credit_at_central_bank_interest_per_week_by_inflation = {
	value = credit_at_central_bank_interest_per_month_by_inflation
	multiply = 0.25
}
income_150 = {
	value = income
	multiply = 1.5
}
income_175 = {
	value = income
	multiply = 1.75
}
income_200 = {
	value = income
	multiply = 2
}
income_225 = {
	value = income
	multiply = 2.25
}
income_250 = {
	value = income
	multiply = 2.5
}
authorized_debt_interest = {
 	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			expenses < income_150
		}
		add = 0.25
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			expenses > income_150
			expenses < income_175
		}
		add = 0.20
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			expenses > income_175
			expenses < income_200
		}
		add = 0.15
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			expenses > income_200
			expenses < income_225
		}
		add = 0.10
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			expenses > income_225
			expenses < income_250
		}
		add = 0.05
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			expenses > income_250
		}
		add = 0
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			country_credit > 0
		}
		add = -1
	}
	min = 0
}
part_budget_authorized_debt_interest = {
	value = income
	multiply = authorized_debt_interest  #par du budget à l'equilibre que la dette doit attendre pour etre suportable
}

gold_market_goods_sell_orders = {
	if  = {
		limit = {
			not = {
				or = {
					is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
					no_indepeendeent_market = yes
				}
			}
		}
		value = {
			add = owner.market.mg:gold.market_goods_sell_orders
		}
	}
}
silver_market_goods_sell_orders = {
	if  = {
		limit = {
			not = {
				or = {
					is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
					no_indepeendeent_market = yes
				}
			}
		}
		value = {
			add = owner.market.mg:silver.market_goods_sell_orders
		}
	}
}

	value = var:stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_var_1
}

	value = var:debt_in_gold

	value = excess_in_gold_sc

global_silver_production_real = {
	add = silver_market_goods_sell_orders
	subtract = market.mg:silver.market_goods_imports
}
global_silver_production_flux = {
	every_country  = {
		limit = {
			#silver_market_goods_sell_orders > 0
			global_silver_production_real > 0
		}
		add = global_silver_production_real
	}
}
global_silver_production = {
	value = 1
	add = global_var:global_silver_production_fix
	add = global_var:global_silver_production_cumulative_production

	min = 1
	max = 500000
}

global_gold_production_real = {
	add = gold_market_goods_sell_orders
	subtract = market.mg:gold.market_goods_imports
}
global_gold_production_flux = {
	every_country  = {
		limit = {
			#gold_market_goods_sell_orders > 0
			global_gold_production_real > 0
		}
		add = global_gold_production_real
	}
}
global_gold_production = {
	value = 1
	add = global_var:global_gold_production_fix
}

silver_to_gold_rate = { # = gold_silver_ rate
	value = global_gold_production
	divide = global_silver_production


	max = 0.2
	min = 0.015625
}

	value = 1
	divide = silver_to_gold_rate
}

	value = gold_to_silver_rate
	multiply = 2
}

bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold = {
	# value = 0
	# add = weight_gold
	# add = {
	# 	value = weight_silver
	# 	multiply = silver_to_gold_rate
	# }
	# min = 0

	value = 1
	divide = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
}
bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver = {
	#value = var:bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver_determined
	#divide = bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold
	value = 0.0000001

	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_no
		}
		add = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_10
		}
		add = 10
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			not = { 
				or = {
					any_active_law = {
						has_amendment = amendment_bimetallic_ratio_15_5_fra
					}
					any_active_law = {
						has_amendment = amendment_bimetallic_ratio_15_5_latine_union
					}
					any_active_law = {
						has_amendment = amendment_usa_bimetallic_ratio_1834
					}
					any_active_law = {
						has_amendment = amendment_spain_bimetallic_ratio_traditional
					}
					any_active_law = {
						has_amendment = amendment_german_bimetallic_ratio_conservative
					}
					any_active_law = {
						has_amendment = amendment_netherlands_bimetallic_ratio
					}
				}
			} 
		}
		add = 15
	}
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_20
		}
		add = 20
	}

	#custom ratio

	#FRA
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			any_active_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_bimetallic_ratio_15_5_fra
			} 
		}
		add = 15.5
	}
	#Union latine
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			any_active_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_bimetallic_ratio_15_5_latine_union
			} 
		}
		add = 15.5
	} 
	#USA
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			any_active_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_usa_bimetallic_ratio_1834
			} 
		}
		add = 16.1
	} 
	#SPA
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			any_active_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_spain_bimetallic_ratio_traditional
			} 
		}
		add = 15.1
	} 
	#GER
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			any_active_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_german_bimetallic_ratio_conservative
			} 
		}
		add = 14.5
	} 
	#NET
	if = {
		limit  = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
			any_active_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_netherlands_bimetallic_ratio
			} 
		}
		add = 15.6
	}  
}
bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver_x_2 = {
	value = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
	multiply = 2
}

gold_to_silver_law = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
	min = 0
}

bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver_law = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		add = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
	}
}

rate_by_law_metal_type = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		add = 1
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
		}
		add = gold_to_silver_rate
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		}
		add = 1 #bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
	}
	min = 0.0001
}

rate_by_law_metal_type_2 = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			#is_subject = yes
			is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_overlord_or_above = {
					or = {
						has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
						has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
					}
				}
			}
			add = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_overlord_or_above = {
					has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
				}
			}
			add = silver_to_gold_rate
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_overlord_or_above = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
				}
			}
			add = 1
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			market_owner_is_root_4 = no
			is_subject = no
		}
		market.owner = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					or = {
						has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
						has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
					}
				}
				add = 1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
				}
				add = silver_to_gold_rate
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
				}
				add = 1
			}
		}
	}

	min = 0.0001
}

money_value_target_pre_set = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_no
		}
		add = var:money_value_target_1_silver
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_15
		}
		add = var:money_value_target_1_bimetallic
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallic_ratio_no
		}
		add = var:money_value_target_1_gold
	}
}

rate_by_law_metal_type_FRA = {
	value = 0

	c:FRA = {
		limit = {
			or = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				or = {
					has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
					has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
				}
			}
			add = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
			}
			add = gold_to_silver_rate
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
			}
			add = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
		}
	}
	min = 0.0001
}
rate_by_law_metal_type_2_FRA = {
	value = 0
	c:FRA = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				or = {
					has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
					has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
				}
			}
			add = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
			}
			add = silver_to_gold_rate
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
			}
			add = bimetallic_rate_silver_to_gold
		}
	}
	min = 0.0001
}

#gold_drain	gold_to_silver_rate > bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
misalignment_rate_gold_drain = {
	value = gold_to_silver_rate
	subtract = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
	divide = gold_to_silver_rate

	min = 0
	max = 0.15   # 15% max de drain/an
}
gold_lost = {
	value = gold_state_native_for_stockpile
	multiply = misalignment_rate_gold_drain
}
silver_gained = {
	value = gold_lost
	multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
}

#silver_drain gold_to_silver_rate < bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
misalignment_rate_silver_drain = {
	value = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
	subtract = gold_to_silver_rate
	divide = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver

	min = 0
	max = 0.15   # 15% max de drain/an
}
silver_lost = {
	value = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
	multiply = misalignment_rate_silver_drain
}
gold_gained = {
	value = silver_lost
	divide = gold_to_silver_rate
}

					multiply = market_goods_buy_orders
				}
			}
			mg:telephones = {
				add = {
					add = market_goods_pricier
					multiply = market_goods_buy_orders
				}
			}
			mg:radios = {
				add = {
					add = market_goods_pricier
					multiply = market_goods_buy_orders
				}
			}
			mg:luxury_clothes = {
				add = {
					add = market_goods_pricier
					multiply = market_goods_buy_orders
				}
			}
			mg:luxury_furniture = {
				add = {
					add = market_goods_pricier
					multiply = market_goods_buy_orders
				}
			}
			mg:fine_art = {
				add = {
					add = market_goods_pricier
					multiply = market_goods_buy_orders
				}
			}
		}
	}
	divide = {
		value = 0.1
		add = market.mg:grain.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:fish.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:fabric.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:clothes.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:furniture.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:paper.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:services.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:transportation.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:porcelain.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:meat.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:fruit.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:wine.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:tea.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:tobacco.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:opium.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:automobiles.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:telephones.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:radios.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:luxury_clothes.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:luxury_furniture.market_goods_buy_orders
		add = market.mg:fine_art.market_goods_buy_orders
	}
}
inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_abs = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = {
			inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value > 0
		}
		add = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value < 0
		}
		subtract = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value
	}
}

	value = global_var:money_value_median
	multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
}

	value = global_var:money_value_median
	multiply = 1.25
}

	value = global_var:money_value_median
	multiply = 0.75
}

	value = money_value_in_gold
	divide = global_var:money_value_median
}

	value = global_var:money_value_median
	multiply = 0.5
}

money_value_median_2_1 = {
	value = global_var:money_value_median
	multiply = 2.1
}

revaluation_money_value_max = {
	value = global_var:money_value_median
	multiply = 2
	multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
}

devaluation_money_value_target_trigger_var = {
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit = {
			devaluation_money_value_target_trigger = yes
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

revaluation_money_value_target_trigger_var = {
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit = {
			revaluation_money_value_target_trigger = yes
		}
		add = 1
	}
}

devaluation_money_value_target = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		#1
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.1
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.1
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.1
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.2
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.2
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.2
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.3
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.1
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.3
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.3
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.4
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.2
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.4
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.4
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.5
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.3
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.5
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.5
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.6
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.4
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.6
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.6
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.7
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.5
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.7
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.7
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.8
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.6
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.8
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.8
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.9
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.7
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.9 si au dessu alors à chaque dévaluation il fait perdre 10%
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.9
		}
		value = {
			add = var:money_value_target_1
			multiply = 0.9
		}
		#multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}

	# if = {
	# 	#compren pas
	# 	limit = {
	# 		var:money_value_target_1 > revaluation_money_value_max
	# 	}
	# 	value = revaluation_money_value_max
	# }
}
revaluation_money_value_target = {
	value = 0

	if = { #réévalue à la valeur de la moyenne si la cible est a 0
		limit = {
			var:money_value_target_1 = 0
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}

	if = {
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio <  1
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 0.9
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.8
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.9
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.8
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.8
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.9
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.7
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.7
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.8
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.6
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.6
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.7
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.5
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.5
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.6
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.4
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.4
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.5
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.3
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.3
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.4
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.2
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.2
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.3
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}

	max = revaluation_money_value_max
}
overlord_money_value_target = {
	value = overlord.var:money_value_target_1
}

devaluation_money_value_target_in_gold = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		#1
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.1
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#1.1
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.1
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.2
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1
	}
	if = {
		#1.2
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.2
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.3
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.1
	}
	if = {
		#1.3
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.3
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.4
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.2
	}
	if = {
		#1.4
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.4
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.5
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.3
	}
	if = {
		#1.5
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.5
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.6
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.4
	}
	if = {
		#1.6
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.6
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.7
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.5
	}
	if = {
		#1.7
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.7
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.8
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.6
	}
	if = {
		#1.8
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.8
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 1.9
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1.7
	}
	if = {
		#1.9
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 1.9
		}
		value  = {
			add = var:money_value_target_1
			multiply = 0.9
		}
	}

	if = {
		#
		limit = {
			var:money_value_target_1 > revaluation_money_value_max
		}
		value = revaluation_money_value_max
		divide = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
}
revaluation_money_value_target_in_gold = {
	value = 0

	if = { #réévalue à la valeur de la moyenne si la cible est a 0
		limit = {
			var:money_value_target_1 = 0
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
	}

	if = {
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio <  1
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio > 0.9
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
	}

	if = {
		#0.8
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.9
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 1
	}
	if = {
		#0.8
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.8
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.9
	}
	if = {
		#0.7
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.7
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.8
	}
	if = {
		#0.6
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.6
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.7
	}
	if = {
		#0.5
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.5
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.6
	}
	if = {
		#0.4
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.4
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.5
	}
	if = {
		#0.3
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.3
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.4
		multiply = rate_by_law_metal_type
	}
	if = {
		#0.2
		limit = {
			money_value_median_and_money_value_in_gold_ratio < 0.2
		}
		value = global_var:money_value_median
		multiply = 0.3
	}

	#max = revaluation_money_value_max
}

private_bank_borrowings_year = {
	#value = private_bank_funds
 
	if = {
		limit = {
			base_rate_effective_growth > 0
		}
		value = money_supply
		multiply = base_rate_effective_growth
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			base_rate_effective_growth < 0
		}
		value = private_bank_funds
		multiply = base_rate_effective_growth
	}

	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.05
	# 	}
	# 	add = var:direct_transfer
	# }
}
private_bank_borrowings_year_gui = { 
	value = 0
	
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		# or = {
	# 		# 	central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent > 0.75
	# 		# 	is_player = yes #meme si dépasse continue d'ajouter c'est au joueur de gérer
	# 		# }
	# 		or = {
	# 			private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
	# 			is_player = yes #meme si dépasse continue d'ajouter c'est au joueur de gérer
	# 		}
	# 	}
	# 	add = private_bank_borrowings_year 
	# } 
	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year < 0 
			private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.15 #minn 15% d'équivalent du money supply protegé par l'érosion 
		}
		add = private_bank_borrowings_year 
	} 
} 

#gui
private_bank_borrowings_year_var_1 = {
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			var:base_rate_percentage > 0.01
		}
		value = var:base_rate_percentage
		multiply = 10
	}
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			var:base_rate_percentage < 0.01
		}
		value = var:base_rate_percentage #0.95
		multiply = 2
	}
}
base_rate_percentage_revers = {
	value = 1 
	subtract = var:base_rate_percentage 
	# subtract = {
	# 	value = var:base_rate_percentage
	# 	multiply = 1
	# }
}

base_rate_percentage_decimal = {
	value = var:base_rate_percentage
	multiply = 100
}

# private_bank_borrowings_year_var_2 = {
# 	if  = {

# 		value = base_rate_percentage_revers
# 	} 
# } 

ef_msf = {
    base = 0

    # Couverture très basse : 0% → 80%
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.80
        }
        add = -0.5
    }

    # Couverture basse : 80% → 95%
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.80
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.95
        }
        add = -0.25
    }

    # Couverture neutre : 95% → 105%
    # (pas d’add, donc MSF = 0)

    # Couverture haute : 105% → 120%
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.05
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.20
        }
        add = 0.25
    }

    # Couverture très haute : > 120%
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.20
        }
        add = 0.5
    }
}

BRI  = {
	value =  0.1
	subtract = var:base_rate_percentage
	divide = 0.1

	min = 0
}  
effective_pool_growth = {
	value = BRI 
	multiply  = {
		add = 1 
		add = ef_msf 
	} 
} 
   
base_rate_percentage_target = {
    value = 0

    # --- Zone 1 : Couverture en crise absolue (< 40%) ---
    if = {
        limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.40 }
        add = 0.10     # 10%
    }

    # --- Zone 2 : Mauvaise couverture (40% → 70%) ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.40
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.70
        }
        add = 0.08     # 8%
    }

    # --- Zone 3 : Zone normale / historique (70% → 110%) ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.70
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.10
        }
        add = 0.05     # 5% (taux neutre historique)
    }

    # --- Zone 4 : Couverture solide (110% → 150%) ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.10
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.50
        }
        add = 0.03     # 3%
    }

    # --- Zone 5 : Couverture excellente (> 150%) ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.50
        }
        add = 0.01     # 1% (taux plancher absolu)
    }
}
base_rate_percentage_delta = {
	value = var:base_rate_percentage
	subtract = var:base_rate_percentage_old
}













base_rate_effective_growth = {
    value = 0

    # --- EXPANSION FORTE (taux très bas) ---
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage < 0.02 } add = 0.10 }    
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.02 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.03 } add = 0.08 }
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.03 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.04 } add = 0.06 }
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.04 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.05 } add = 0.04 }
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.05 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.06 } add = 0.02 }

    # --- ZONE NEUTRE ---
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.06 var:base_rate_percentage <= 0.07 } add = 0.00 }

    # --- CONTRACTION ---
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage > 0.07 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.08 } add = -0.02 }
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.08 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.09 } add = -0.04 }
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.09 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.10 } add = -0.06 }
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.10 var:base_rate_percentage < 0.11 } add = -0.08 }
 
 
    # --- CONTRACTION FORTE ---
    if = { limit = { var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.11 } add = -0.10 }
}




































#valeur de suivit debug


base_rate_direction_exit_neutral_zone = {
    value = 0

    # --- ZONE NEUTRE 6–7% : sortie de la zone neutre  ---
    if = {
        limit = { 
            var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.06
            var:base_rate_percentage <= 0.07
        }

        # Si pool privé trop faible (<15%) → remonter vers 7%
        if = {
            limit = { private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_min_limit }
            add = -1
        }

        # Si pool privé suffisant mais sous-utilisé → baisser légèrement
        if = {
            limit = {
                private_bank_funds_pourcent >= 0.15 
		  	 	private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
            }
            add = -1
        }

        # Si pool privé en surcharge → remonter un peu
        if = {
            limit = { 
		  	 	private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage très mauvais (< 0.70) → remonter un peu
        if = {
            limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.70 }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage excellent (> 1.10) → baisser légèrement
        if = {
            limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent > 1.10 }
            add = -1
        }
    }
}
 
base_rate_direction_rebalancing_pos_to_neutral = {
    value = 0

    # --- rééquilibrage positif vers zone neutre ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
            # or = {
            #     private_bank_funds_prevision > private_bank_funds_limit
            #     private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
            # }
		    private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
            var:base_rate_percentage < 0.06
        }
        add = 1
    }
} 
base_rate_direction_pos_borrowing = {
    value = 0

    # --- progression du taux positif (freinage du crédit privé) ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
            # or = {
            #     private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
            #     private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
            # }
		    private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
            var:base_rate_percentage < 0.06
            var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.01
        }

        # Coverage critique (<60%) → ajustement minimal
        if = {
            limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.60 }
            add = 1


			#retour à la zone de neutralité +++++ voir on of neutre progression mais etour vers 6%
        }

        # Coverage faible (60–80%) → petite pente
        if = {
            limit = {
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.60
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.80
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage normal (80–100%) → pente modérée
        if = {
            limit = {
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.80
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.00
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage bon (100–120%) → pente forte
        if = {
            limit = {
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.00
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.20
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage excédentaire (>120%) → pente maximale
        if = {
            limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.20 }
            add = 1
        }
    }
}
 
base_rate_direction_rebalancing_neg_to_neutral = {
    value = 0

    # --- rééquilibrage négatif vers zone neutre ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
           	private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_min_limit
            var:base_rate_percentage > 0.07
        }
        add = 1
    }
} 
base_rate_direction_neg_borrowing = {
    value = 0

    # --- progression du taux négatif ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
            private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_min_limit
            var:base_rate_percentage > 0.07
            var:base_rate_percentage <= 0.11
        }

        # Coverage critique (<60%)
        if = {
            limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.60 }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage faible (60–80%)
        if = {
            limit = {
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.60
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.80
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage normal (80–100%)
        if = {
            limit = {
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.80
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.00
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage bon (100–120%)
        if = {
            limit = {
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.00
                central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.20
            }
            add = 1
        }

        # Coverage excédentaire (>120%)
        if = {
            limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.20 }
            add = 1
        }
    }
}


pool_growing = {
    value = 0 
    if = {
        limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year > 0 
            # or = {
            #     private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
            #     private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
            # }
		    private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
        }
        add = 1
    }
} 

pol_erosion = {
    value = 0 
    if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year < 0 
			private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.15 #minn 15% d'équivalent du money supply protegé par l'érosion 
		}
        add = 1
    }
}

#dinar
valid_dinar_metal_reserve_type = {
	value = 0
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			law_dinar_monetary_system_GS_BS_GES_trigger = yes
		}
		add = gold_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			law_dinar_monetary_system_SS_trigger = yes
		}
		add = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
}

#private bank

############################################################################################################################################################

#3 types de bank privé
# global_arbitrage_bank
# national_financial_investor
# domestic_bank

total_bank_funds = {
	value = private_bank_funds
	add = funds_from_foreign_debt_total
	add = private_bank_foreign_reserves_per_bank 
 	add = private_bank_gold_reserve_bank
	add = private_bank_silver_reserve_bank_in_gold  
} 
private_bank_funds_per_private_bank = {
	value = private_bank_funds
	divide = total_privat_bank
}
total_privat_bank = {
	every_in_list = {
		variable = privat_bank_variable_list_ordered
		add  = 1
	}
} 
private_bank_funds_per_private_bank_add_foreign_debt = { #valeur que détient une bank dans la ligne GUI -> pour gui +++ besoins de scope
	value = owner.private_bank_funds_per_private_bank
	add = funds_from_foreign_debt
	add = private_bank_foreign_reserves_per_bank_gui 
	add = private_bank_gold_reserve_per_bank_gui
	add = private_bank_silver_reserve_per_bank_gui_in_gold 
}

#Bank d'arbitrage - international_arbitrage_house
# - utiliser ces bank comme des pays qui arbitre les currency
# - elle doivent avoir leur propre varriable globale
# - leur réserve doit apparaitre dans l'interface du joeur qui les possede

# investment_pool_10
 
private_bank_foreign_reserves_per_bank = {
	value = 0
    #company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_company = company_type:company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
		}
  	  	add = company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr_total_in_gold
	}
    #company_Rothschild_Bank_fra

		limit = {
